source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The True Flex
archetype.receipt: 4 roles at 100+ games, all within 2.1 wins per 100 of each other — genuinely fill-proof.

entries.change: Move your jungle games to midlane

entries.receipt: 53.3% over 137 games on Kira vs 52.2% overall

entries.change: Queue midlane instead of your average mix
entries.receipt: 53.1% there vs 52.2% overall, 159 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

leanInto.name: Kira
leanInto.engineCoachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Viper), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +20.3% on this kit’s main output at minute 15.

plan: Queue midlane as primary. It is your best role at 53.1% over 159 games (your overall is 52.2%). Set carry as secondary, not the other way around.
Comfort-hero rule for the climb: Kira. Compared with the average player on the same hero, you win about 3.3 more games per 100 on it.
Your champion pool is 16+ heroes wide and your top three are only 30% of your games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on your top three.
The math: you are at 668 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. Your all-time peak is 922 — you have already touched Platinum-level rating once; this is a consistency problem, not a ceiling problem.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward your own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where you win, not why

insights.title: You win the long game
insights.finding: Past 32 minutes you win 70% vs 20% in short games. Scaling comps and patience suit you; avoid coin-flip early all-ins.
insights.receipt: wins 2 of 10 short games vs 7 of 10 long ones, recent sample

insights.title: Cuban brings out your best
insights.finding: Your record alongside Cuban Noobster is 56% over 200 ranked games — your strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of you queue, make it this one.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: 3 pentakills in real 5v5s and a longest spree of 19 (plus 2 more in ARAM and brawls — the group chat can rule on whether those count). Goldilocks324 has receipts.

insights.title: Your lean, relative to the squad: vision work
insights.finding: Goldilocks324's profile sits mid-pack on most axes; the clearest lean is vision work at 1.3x the squad average. Steady is a style too — the lineup can build around predictability.
